meaning: adj.印度的,印度人的,印第安人的n.印度人,印第安人,印第安语
examples: Chapattis are a kind of flat Indian bread.
She symbolized for me the best of Indian womanhood.
Ludo is a version of an ancient Indian racing game.
The Indian Room was commissioned by George Spencer-Churchill, the 5th Duke of Marlborough, in 1826.
He made a fortune in 2007, buying Chinese, Indian and Gulf States stocks and non-U.S. currencies.
